inputs.label: Fuel Mass Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Mass flow rate of fuel consumed by the engine or boiler.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass flow rate of fuel consumed by the engine or boiler.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor veya kazan tarafından tüketilen yakıtın kütlesel akış hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Massenstrom des vom Motor oder Kessel verbrauchten Brennstoffs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit massique du carburant consommé par le moteur ou la chaudière.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal másico de combustible consumido por el motor o la caldera.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل التدفق الكتلي للوقود الذي يستهلكه المحرك أو المرجل.

inputs.label: Power Output
inputs.businessContext: Net power output of the engine or plant.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net power output of the engine or plant.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motorun veya tesisin net güç çıkışı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nettoleistungsabgabe des Motors oder der Anlage.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance nette du moteur ou de l'installation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia neta de salida del motor o la instalación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: خرج الطاقة الصافي للمحرك أو المنشأة.

inputs.label: Carbon Content
inputs.businessContext: Amount of carbon per unit mass of fuel (e.g., ~0.86 for diesel, ~0.75 for natural gas).

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of carbon per unit mass of fuel (e.g., ~0.86 for diesel, ~0.75 for natural gas).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıtın birim kütlesi başına içerdiği karbon miktarı (ör. motorin için ~0,86, doğalgaz için ~0,75).
businessContext_i18n.de: Menge an Kohlenstoff pro Masseneinheit des Brennstoffs (z. B. ~0,86 für Diesel, ~0,75 für Erdgas).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité de carbone par unité de masse du carburant (ex. ~0,86 pour le diesel, ~0,75 pour le gaz naturel).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de carbono por unidad de masa del combustible (p. ej., diésel ~0,86, gas natural ~0,75).
businessContext_i18n.ar: كمية الكربون لكل وحدة كتلة من الوقود (مثال: للديزل ~0.86، للغاز الطبيعي ~0.75).

inputs.label: Oxidation Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of carbon in fuel that is converted to CO2 during combustion (typically 0.99).

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of carbon in fuel that is converted to CO2 during combustion (typically 0.99).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıttaki karbonun yanma sırasında CO2'ye dönüşme oranı (genellikle 0,99).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil des Kohlenstoffs im Brennstoff, der während der Verbrennung in CO2 umgewandelt wird (normalerweise 0,99).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de conversion du carbone en CO₂ lors de la combustion (généralement 0,99).
businessContext_i18n.es: Proporción del carbono del combustible que se convierte en CO2 durante la combustión (generalmente 0,99).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة تحول الكربون في الوقود إلى CO2 أثناء الاحتراق (عادة 0.99).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
